ingredients.item: cacao nibs, ½ cup (1 dl) goji berries, ¾ cup (1½ dl) pumpkin seeds
ground-cherries, 1 cup (2 dl) cashews, ½ cup (1 dl) cacao nibs
mulberries, ½ cup (1dl) coarsely chopped almonds, ½ cup (1 dl) grated coconut
raisins, ½ cup (1 dl) hazelnuts (filberts), 3 tbsp whole cacao beans, ½ cup (1 dl) sunflower seeds
